content.json: # SafeHarbor Staging Telemetry Dashboard\nTracks request volume, failures, and latency for backend health.

content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName == 'safeharbor-api-staging'
| summarize Requests=count() by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Request Volume (5m)

content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName == 'safeharbor-api-staging'
| summarize FailureRate = 100.0 * countif(success == false) / count() by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Failure Rate % (5m)

content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName == 'safeharbor-api-staging'
| summarize P95=percentile(duration,95), Avg=avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Latency (Avg / P95)
